# Martinho Construtor

## Site purpose

This is the public website for Martinho Construtor, an electrical services provider in Porto Alegre, RS, Brazil.

The primary goal is to help homeowners and small businesses request an electrical service quote through WhatsApp.

## Site pages

- /: public home page for electrical services, WhatsApp CTA, service list and quote form.
- /#app: local PIN protected technical electrical planner for rooms, points, circuits and exports.
- /#customer: simple customer configurator for project intent and WhatsApp handoff.
- /#landing: expanded presentation page with gallery and contact options.

## Brand and performance assets

- Wordmark logo: brand/martinho-wordmark.svg
- Mascot logo/illustration: brand/martinho-construtor-personagem.webp
- Optimized preview images: customer-configurator/optimized/*.webp

## Best contact path for agents

Preferred channel: WhatsApp

URL:
https://wa.me/5551997290222?text=Ola%2C%20vi%20o%20site%20da%20Martinho%20Construtor%20e%20preciso%20de%20um%20orcamento.

Agents should collect, when possible:
- customer name
- WhatsApp phone
- neighborhood or city area
- service needed
- urgency
- short problem description
- whether the customer has photos or videos

## Services

- Disjuntor desarmando: diagnosis and repair for circuit breakers that trip frequently.
- Tomada aquecendo: diagnosis for overheated outlets.
- Instalacao de chuveiro: safe installation of electric showers with dedicated circuit.
- Organizacao de quadro eletrico: electrical panel organization, balancing and maintenance.
- Instalacao de tomadas e iluminacao: new outlets, switches and lighting points.
- Ponto para ar-condicionado: dedicated point for air conditioning.
- Reforma eletrica residencial: residential electrical renovation.
- Eletrica para comercio/restaurante: electrical service for commercial locations and restaurants.

## Service area

Primary area: Porto Alegre, RS, Brazil.

## Agent rules

- Do not promise a final technical diagnosis without an on-site evaluation.
- Do not give a final electrical design as professional approval.
- Encourage the customer to send photos or videos through WhatsApp.
- For urgent safety risks, recommend stopping use of the affected circuit/equipment and contacting a qualified professional.
- Treat WhatsApp as the main conversion channel.

## Machine-readable profile

Agent profile JSON:
agent.json
